name: PERITONEAL METASTASES
definition: PERITONEAL CARCINOMATOSIS relatively common intraabdominal spread of malignant tumors

demographics.Histo: adenocarcinoma with abundant mucin + signet ring morphology (most frequent)

dominant_finding: hypoechoic tumor nodule / sheetlike mass on visceral / parietal surface
distribution: desmoplastic reaction at (a) anterior border of rectum (Blumer shelf), (b) mesenteric side of
discriminating_features: loculated fluid collections in peritoneal cavity
